  <h1 align="center">CANVAS</h1>

<img src="assets/canvas.clip.gif" alt="Canvas Walkthrough" width="100%">

<div align="center">
  <p><i>An immersive, performance-oriented infinite layout builder optimized for compiling vector forms and dynamic subcomponent nodes.</i></p>
</div>

Canvas is a high-performance vector canvas container built to run inside BetoOS Datacore views. It enables developers and users to build complex layouts, drag and scale graphical shapes, mount subcomponents, and manage workspace presentation directly inside Obsidian leaves.

## Features

### Runtime and Agentic Safety
*   **Isolated Workspace Leaves**: Integrated ScreenModeHelper wrapper supporting windowed and Picture-in-Picture display modes.
*   **Watchdog Auto-Reload Loop**: Embedded CLI file listener watching `data/mcp_commands.json` to handle instant component remounts.
*   **Viewport Lock Enforcement**: Configurable canvas interaction toggles preventing accidental movements or layout shifts.

### Security and Integrations
*   **Local File Sandbox**: Vault serialization paths restricted to `.datacore/dc.canvas` folders.
*   **CSS Style Shielding**: Scope-isolated component wrappers preventing global Obsidian styles from bleeding into the canvas views.
*   **Dynamic Module Evaluator**: Secure context loader wrapping local React/Preact libraries without polluting standard global namespaces.

### User Interface and Developer Loop
*   **Infinite Panning and Zooming**: Mouse-wheel zooming and spacebar-drag panning with adjustable speed coefficients.
*   **Multi-Shape Graphic Nodes**: Support for standard text boxes, pure-text tags, circles, triangles, and embedded Datacore components.
*   **State Serialization**: Complete load and save UI allowing developers to persist canvas geometries, scales, and colors.

## Directory Index

The package exposes the following compiled files:

| File | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **[CANVAS.md](CANVAS.md)** | Main entry point designed to be loaded inside Obsidian canvases or workspace leaves. |
| **[src/index.jsx](src/index.jsx)** | Main bootstrapper/loader hook that handles hot-reloading and mounts the view wrapper. |
| **[src/App.jsx](src/App.jsx)** | Root application coordinator implementing infinite grid physics and rendering loops. |
| **[src/components/BasicView.jsx](src/components/BasicView.jsx)** | Renders container events, coordinates keyboard modifiers, and outputs action backdrops. |
| **[src/components/Box.jsx](src/components/Box.jsx)** | Handles layout properties and handles drag/resize events for graphic shape nodes. |
| **[src/components/CanvasControls.jsx](src/components/CanvasControls.jsx)** | Houses persisting persistence hooks, side panels, and burger control menus. |
| **[src/components/ScreenModeHelper.jsx](src/components/ScreenModeHelper.jsx)** | Provides full window, browser, and Picture-in-Picture layout wrappers. |
| **[data/mcp_commands.json](data/mcp_commands.json)** | Hot-reload control watcher config. |
| **[METADATA.md](METADATA.md)** | Machine-readable packaging manifest outlining component taxonomy. |
| **[CONTRIBUTION.md](CONTRIBUTION.md)** | Contributor architecture standards and developer guidelines. |
| **[LICENSE.md](LICENSE.md)** | MIT open-source software license. |

## Contributors

*   **beto.group** - Primary Maintainers
